positive: Minimalist abstract woodland scene print, featuring stylized, chunky silhouette cutouts of various deciduous leaves, ferns, and whimsical stylized woodland animals like deer, rabbits, and foxes, arranged in a symmetrical, circular composition. The style should be highly graphic, reminiscent of modern nature illustrations but simplified for screen printing. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep sage green, earthy burnt orange, midnight indigo, and creamy ivory. The composition must be perfectly centered and repeat seamlessly if required for a large print. Ideal for apparel or home goods. Strong outlines, clean vectors, flat graphic design, high contrast, vector art, central composition, high detail, print-ready.
